creator: rometravelers
caption:
Rome’s beauty doesn’t have to break the bank! ✨ Explore stunning sights for less than 10€ with @ale_trinchero 🌟

💡Rome is full of gorgeous spots that won’t cost you more than a coffee! From wandering the vibrant streets of Trastevere, where the charming atmosphere and cobblestone alleys make for unforgettable views, to visiting the beautiful Spanish Steps (free entry!), there are many picturesque locations to enjoy on a budget. You can also marvel at the Pantheon’s majestic architecture for free!

What’s your favorite affordable spot in Rome? Drop your best recommendations! 👇💬

📍Rome 🇮🇹
